claim: xAI Grok Voice Agent API costs $0.05 per minute flat rate
quote: The Grok Voice Agent API adopts a straightforward, flat-rate fee of $0.05 per minute of connection time.

claim: OpenAI GPT-Realtime-2 audio input costs $32 per 1M tokens, audio output costs $64 per 1M tokens
quote: GPT-Realtime-2 audio input is listed at $32 per 1M tokens

claim: Google Gemini Live API audio input costs $1.00 per 1M tokens, audio output costs $20.00 per 1M tokens
quote: Audio Input: $1.00, Audio Output: $20.00 per 1M tokens

claim: Ultravox charges $0.05 per minute for voice AI calls including TTS
quote: First 30 minutes free, $0.05/min after that.

claim: Self-hosting Qwen3-TTS on RunPod costs ~$24 for 100K utterances vs $2,220 for ElevenLabs Flash
quote: At 100K utterances per month, self-hosting Qwen3-TTS on burst GPU pricing costs $24 — versus $2,220 for ElevenLabs Flash

claim: Retell AI charges $0.07/min base voice engine rate plus separate LLM costs
quote: Retell charges $0.07 per minute as its base voice engine rate

claim: Deepgram Voice Agent API costs $0.075/min Standard tier, $0.065/min with BYO TTS
quote: Voice Agent API (Standard) — 50,000 min × $0.075

claim: Hume EVI 3 overage costs $0.07/min on Starter/Creator, down to $0.04/min on Business
quote: on EVI 3, overage falls from $0.07/min (Starter/Creator) to $0.06 (Pro), $0.05 (Scale), and $0.04 (Business)

claim: Cartesia Voice Agents cost $0.06/min plus $0.014/min telephony
quote: Agent calling: $0.06 per minute. Telephony (add-on): +$0.014

claim: Qwen3-TTS is Apache 2.0 licensed, runs on RTX 4090 at 5.4GB VRAM, 101ms TTFA
quote: Apache 2.0 licensed. It runs on an RTX 4090 at 5.4 GB VRAM with FlashAttention 2. 101ms time-to-first-audio.

claim: Chatterbox TTS is MIT licensed, 500M parameters, trained on 500K hours
quote: Chatterbox is ResembleAI's revolutionary open-source TTS model with 500M parameters trained on 500,000 hours of audio.

claim: SvelteKit can integrate with OpenAI Realtime via WebRTC using ephemeral keys
quote: SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 runes give you reactive voice UI with 30% smaller bundles than React. Wire WebRTC ephemeral keys to OpenAI Realtime for browser-direct voice.

claim: RunPod RTX 4090 costs $0.34/hr spot, L40S costs $0.79/hr spot
quote: RTX 4090: $0.34/hr spot. L40S: $0.79/hr spot.

claim: ElevenLabs overage costs $0.08/min standard, $0.16/min burst
quote: Once your included minutes are exhausted, additional calls are billed at $0.08/min. Burst pricing at $0.16/min.

claim: Google Gemini Live API is 32x cheaper than OpenAI Realtime for audio input
quote: Audio Input / 1M Tokens: Google $1.00 vs OpenAI $32.00 — 32x Cheaper

claim: Baseten offers Qwen3-TTS at $3-4 per 1M characters, 90% cheaper than closed-source
quote: We optimized Qwen3-TTS to $3 per 1M characters. 90% lower-cost than closed-source alternatives.

claim: Deepgram offers $200 free credits on signup with no credit card required
quote: $200 free credits on signup (no credit card required), ~43K minutes transcription with Nova model, credits never expire.

claim: Vapi charges $0.05/min orchestration fee plus BYO STT/LLM/TTS costs
quote: Vapi's $0.05/min orchestration fee. Bring-your-own-key for STT/LLM/TTS.

claim: Kokoro-82M is free (Apache 2.0), runs on CPU, available via fal.ai at $0.02/1K chars
quote: Kokoro: Free (self-hosted) · $0.02/1K chars via fal.ai. Apache 2.0 — free for commercial use.

claim: Voxtral TTS API costs $0.016 per 1,000 characters, open weights under CC BY NC 4.0
quote: Voxtral TTS uses character-based pricing at $0.016 per 1,000 characters.

claim: xAI Grok Voice Agent API is compatible with OpenAI Realtime protocol, uses WebSocket
quote: The API follows the OpenAI Realtime protocol. WebSocket connection at wss://api.x.ai/v1/realtime, same event schema.

claim: Hume EVI 3 starts at $0.0X/min with pricing below $0.02/min at highest volumes
quote: Pricing starts at $0.0X/min and we can offer prices well below $0.02/min for the highest volume applications.

claim: ElevenLabs Conversational AI free plan includes 15 min/month, 4 concurrent calls
quote: Free plan that includes 15 minutes of AI calling per month, 4 concurrent calls.

claim: Combined STT+LLM+TTS chained pipeline can cost as little as $0.01-0.02/min total
quote: Basic voice AI—like text-to-speech or speech recognition—can cost as little as $0.008 per minute.

claim: Chatterbox Turbo achieves sub-200ms latency with emotion control and voice cloning
quote: Chatterbox-Turbo (350M parameters, MIT license, sub-200ms with tuning, emotion control, voice cloning).
